title: heliciopsis incisa
intro: Heliciopsis incisa is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the 'cut-leaved heliciopsis' or 'cut-leaved helici'. This plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Heliciopsis incisa include its ability to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and potentially lower blood pressure. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
